Home / Services / Fence Repair & Maintenance

Fence Repair & Maintenance

Extending the life of your fence with expert repairs.

Even the most durable fences can succumb to the wear and tear of New York City's harsh weather conditions and occasional accidents. Citation Fence Company offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services to ensure the longevity and performance of your investment.

Our experienced technicians are skilled in repairing all types of fences, including wood, chain link, vinyl, and aluminum. We handle everything from minor repairs, such as replacing broken boards or tightening loose posts, to major repairs, such as rebuilding sections damaged by storms or accidents.

We also provide preventative maintenance services, such as staining and sealing wood fences, to protect them from the elements and prolong their lifespan. Regular maintenance can help prevent costly repairs down the road. Trust Citation Fence Company to keep your fence in top condition.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough inspection to assess the extent of the damage and identify the root cause.
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed repair plan and cost estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional repairs using high-quality materials and proven techniques.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repairs are completed to your satisfaction.

Benefits

  • Extends the life of your fence
  • Prevents costly replacements
  • Enhances the security of your property
  • Maintains the aesthetic appeal of your fence

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I inspect my fence for damage?

We recommend inspecting your fence at least twice a year, especially after severe weather events.

Can you repair a leaning fence?

Yes, we can repair leaning fences by resetting the posts and reinforcing the foundation.

Do you offer emergency fence repair services?

Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for situations that pose a security risk or safety hazard.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence repair & maintenance? Contact us today.
